untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying two peaks with shallow recession between them and measuring peak proximity—requires multi-bar pattern recognition not available with single-bar indicators. Resistance level is contextual and not dynamically calculable from allowed indicators. Volume trend information is referenced but author provides no values (AUTHOR_SILENT). Approximate translation using Donchian Channel upper (resistance proxy), prior high comparison (peak detection), and pivot S1 (lower sell line proxy) provided, but true pattern confirmation cannot be mechanically validated.
translation_notes: Entry approximates the 'run' phase where price challenges recent resistance (dc_upper) after pullback (close < prev_high), with confirmation via break below lower sell line (pivot s1). Exit on break below s1. Actual pattern requires visual confirmation of two peaks with shallow dip between them, which cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicators. stop_loss_pct set to 3% as reasonable default for reversal patterns. hold_days_max set to 14 days based on 'next 2 weeks' timeframe mentioned in source text.
